docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HEE SHEN BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT GALVIN, RICHARD GALVIN, PATRICK DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

JUDGE WICK, BRENDA FIELDS, REPORTER. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CASE SETTLED TERMS READ INTO THE RECORD. PLTF. TO PREPARE STIP, FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT.

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HEE SHEN BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-08-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON AUG-15-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT GALVIN, RICHARD GALVIN, PATRICK

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GALVIN, RICHARD GALVIN, PATRICK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 147 WOOD ST, #3 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94118, LEASE FORFEITED, EXECUTION STAYED TILL PAYMENTS OF ALL RENT ARREARAGES, & DEFTS TO MAKE ALL ALL CURRENT MONTHLY RENTAL PAYMENTS ON TIME. DEFTS IN ARREARS FOR $3825 FROM 3-1-94 TO 7-31-94. DEFTS TO PAY 1/2 OF $800 ATTY FEES & COSTS IN ADDITION TO RENT ARREARAGE.
